ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reservoirs" (
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservoir */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reservoir */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the reservoir */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the reservoir (in volume) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the reservoir */,
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the administrator of the reservoir */,
  "current_storage" REAL /* Current storage in the reservoir */,
  "target_storage" REAL /* Target storage level for the reservoir */,
  "minimum_storage" REAL /* Minimum allowed storage level for the reservoir */,
  "maximum_storage" REAL /* Maximum allowed storage level for the reservoir */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid (true/false) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the simulation in JSON format */,
  "started_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature on that day */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation on that day */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage on that day */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed on that day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservoir_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservoir where the operation took place */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date of the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., maintenance, inspection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservoir_operations_reservoir_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoir_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservoir_operations_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
